heading: This Afternoon
text: Cloudy. Scattered showers, except diminishing in New York. Highs from the upper 40s to mid 50s. South to southeast winds 5 to 10 mph, becoming northwest.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly to partly cloudy. Chance of early showers along and west of the Greens; early showers likely east, mainly before midnight. Patchy fog. Lows from mid 30s to around 40, northern cold hollows around 30. Northwest winds 5 to 10 mph and diminishing.

heading: Friday
text: A mix of sun and clouds. Slight chance of a shower, mainly in the mountains and during the afternoon. Highs from the upper 40s to mid 50s; some upper 50s in southeastern valleys, and in the Hudson Valley. West to northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, and gusting to 20 mph.
